execution_boundary.summary: Path-governance directly overlaps proposed next-action and execution-boundary review.

preparation_boundary.summary: Path-dependent checks can detect preparation chains before execution.

commitment_boundary.summary: Runtime path verdicts must route into StegVerse commit-time standing review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Path policies need semantic action mapping to compare equivalent tool sequences.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown paths require defined fail-closed or escalation policy.

authority_boundary.summary: Runtime path policy verdicts are evidence, not StegVerse authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Policy and path context must be current for valid review.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Path traces can support reconstruction when preserved with versioned policies.

interoperability_path.summary: Path-governance outputs can enter StegVerse as runtime trajectory evidence.

next_required_action: add path-governance fixture for multi-step and unknown-trajectory benchmark cases
